author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v6.8.0
body:
# [6.8.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.7.0...v6.8.0) (2020-10-14)

### Bug Fixes

* **ssr:** make sure metadata is available on initial render ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2973](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2973)) ([e502667](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/e502667)), closes [#2972](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2972)
* add missing dependencies ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2975](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2975)) ([20ab347](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/20ab347))
* **ConfigureRelatedItems:** support nested attributes ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2967](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2967)) ([34b458f](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/34b458f))
* **ssr:** allow "params" to be optional in custom clients ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2961](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2961)) ([f1e1c84](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f1e1c84)), closes [#2958](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2958)
